title: Blood West: Scavengers
desc: Endless West brings a long awaited endless randomizer mode to Blood West! See how long you can survive as you meet familiar friends and old foes in the never ending weird wild west!

title: eFootball Kick-Off!
desc: Experience the excitement of every goal – solo or with everyone! Begin your football journey with eFootball Kick-Off!

title: Spa World
desc: Spa World is a cosy isometric management game where you design and run your own wellness centre — from a bare concrete shell to a five-star sanctuary. Drag out rooms, lay stone paths, hire staff, and keep your guests relaxed. Every decision matters: a dirty sauna loses reputation, an understaffed changing room creates a queue, and a VIP who leaves untreated can torpedo your rating overnight.

title: Echoes of the Museum
desc: "Echoes of the Museum" immerses you in a first-person psychological horror set inside a corrupted museum. You are Alicia, a restoration student drawn into a nightmare where collecting souls opens sealed paths, but slowly erodes your sanity and distorts reality.

title: Neverness to Everness: Dreamwalk Corridor
desc:
Version 1.1 of Neverness to Everness, which includes:
• New Characters: Lacrimosa and Chaos
• New Main Story Chapter
• New areas: Sunward Island and Corridor of Echoes
• New events and game modes
• ...and more!

title: Fate/Grand Order: One Second After Time
Mini Lucy
desc: Mini Lucy is a 3D platforming adventure where players take control of Lucy, a young girl who has mysteriously been shrunk to only a few centimeters tall after discovering a strange green crystal.

title: Springbot: The Last Spark
desc: Embark on a journey to save your fellow robots in colorful side-scrolling style!
